final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [7:0] count
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 8'b00000000;
    end else begin
        count <= {~count[0], count[7:1]};
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
